trait Validator {
    fn validate(&self, input: &str) -> bool;
}

struct MinLength(usize);
impl Validator for MinLength {
    fn validate(&self, input: &str) -> bool {
        input.len() >= self.0
    }
}

struct NoSpaces;
impl Validator for NoSpaces {
    fn validate(&self, input: &str) -> bool {
        !input.contains(' ')
    }
}

fn validate_all(input: &str, rules: &[&dyn Validator]) -> bool {
    rules.iter().all(|r| r.validate(input))
}

fn run_validation_batch(inputs: &[&str]) {
    let rules: Vec<Box<dyn Validator>> = vec![
        Box::new(MinLength(3)),
        Box::new(NoSpaces),
    ];
    for input in inputs {
        let refs: Vec<&dyn Validator> = rules.iter().map(|b| b.as_ref()).collect();
        let _ = validate_all(input, &refs);
    }
}

enum Rule {
    MinLength(usize),
    NoSpaces,
}

impl Rule {
    fn validate(&self, input: &str) -> bool {
        match self {
            Rule::MinLength(n) => input.len() >= *n,
            Rule::NoSpaces => !input.contains(' '),
        }
    }
}

fn run_enum_validation(inputs: &[&str]) {
    let rules = vec![Rule::MinLength(3), Rule::NoSpaces];
    for input in inputs {
        let _ = rules.iter().all(|r| r.validate(input));
    }
}
